sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Turbo Boost
special_mechanics.description: Player can press button to receive brief speed boost; engine temperature gauge increases with use; boost unavailable when temperature reaches OVERHEAT threshold

special_mechanics.name: Power-up Upgrades
special_mechanics.description: At sub-goals (approximately every 4 cities), player chooses between: Hi-Power Engine, Special Turbo, or Super Grip Tires to modify vehicle attributes

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Handling
special_mechanics.description: Player can select automatic transmission or two-speed manual transmission, affecting handling characteristics

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. This is a racing game (not platformer), so traditional jump/gravity physics do not apply. Genesis port received poor reviews (42-53%) with criticism of 'hopeless, mega-jerky 3-D graphics, juddery scrolling'. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources.
